valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Mon 16 Mar 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Tue 17 Mar 2026
general_synopsis: Low just west of Bailey 973 moving steadily northeast losing its identity by midnight tonight. New low expected 150 miles south of Iceland 963 by same time. New high expected alps 1024 by that time
